chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

parts.text: 313 - وَقَالَ مُوسَى بْنُ بَكْرٍ لِلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: إِنَّ أَصْحَابَنَا يَقُولُ

text: ونَ إِنَّمَا أَخْذُ اَلشَّارِبِ وَ اَلْأَظْفَارِ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ فَقَالَ «سُبْحَانَ اَللَّهِ خُذْهَا إِنْ شِئْتَ فِي يَوْمِ اَلْجُمُعَةِ وَ إِنْ شِئْتَ فِي سَائِرِ اَلْأَيَّامِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.313 - Musa ibn Bakr said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"Our companions say that trimming the mustache and nails is only on Jumu’ah."
Imam (as) replied: "Glory be to Allah (swt)! Trim them if you wish on Jumu’ah, or if you wish, on any other day."
